---
name: Accessibility Issue
about: Report an accessibility issue or barrier
title: '[ACCESSIBILITY] '
labels: accessibility, bug
assignees: ''

---

## Accessibility Issue Description
A clear and concise description of the accessibility issue.

## WCAG Guideline
Which WCAG guideline does this issue relate to?
- [ ] 1.1 Text Alternatives
- [ ] 1.2 Time-based Media
- [ ] 1.3 Adaptable
- [ ] 1.4 Distinguishable
- [ ] 2.1 Keyboard Accessible
- [ ] 2.2 Enough Time
- [ ] 2.3 Seizures and Physical Reactions
- [ ] 2.4 Navigable
- [ ] 2.5 Input Modalities
- [ ] 3.1 Readable
- [ ] 3.2 Predictable
- [ ] 3.3 Input Assistance
- [ ] 4.1 Compatible

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (blocks core functionality)
- [ ] High (significant barrier)
- [ ] Medium (moderate barrier)
- [ ] Low (minor barrier)

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the accessibility issue:
1. Go to '...'
2. Use screen reader/keyboard to navigate to '....'
3. Attempt to '....'
4. Observe the accessibility barrier

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what should happen from an accessibility perspective.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happens that creates the accessibility barrier.

## Assistive Technology Used
- [ ] Screen Reader (specify: NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver, etc.)
- [ ] Keyboard Navigation
- [ ] Voice Commands
- [ ] High Contrast Mode
- [ ] Screen Magnification
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Browser and OS
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 91, Firefox 89, Safari 14]
- Screen Reader Version: [e.g. NVDA 2021.3, JAWS 2021, VoiceOver (macOS 12)]

## Code Example
If applicable, provide code that demonstrates the issue:

```html
<!-- Example of problematic code -->
<div onclick="doSomething()">Click me</div>
```

## Suggested Solution
Describe how you think this accessibility issue should be resolved:

```html
<!-- Example of accessible code -->
<button onclick="doSomething()">Click me</button>
```

## Impact
Describe the impact this issue has on users:
- Who is affected?
- How does it impact their ability to use the application?
- What workarounds exist (if any)?

## Testing
- [ ] I have tested this with multiple screen readers
- [ ] I have tested this with keyboard navigation only
- [ ] I have tested this with high contrast mode
- [ ] I have tested this with different browsers
- [ ] I have tested this with different operating systems

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the accessibility issue here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing accessibility issues
- [ ] I have provided all the required information above
- [ ] I have identified the specific WCAG guideline
- [ ] I have tested with multiple assistive technologies
- [ ] I have provided a suggested solution
- [ ] I have described the impact on users
